prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.9 kg; Height 163.8 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.9%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 255mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 226mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 273mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.2kg; 9 months ago 64.9kg; 6 months ago 65.1kg; 3 months ago 62.2kg; current 64.9kg), Height (12 months ago 163.8cm; 9 months ago 163.8cm; 6 months ago 163.8cm; 3 months ago 163.8cm; current 163.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 83mg/g; 9 months ago 93mg/g; 6 months ago 73mg/g; 3 months ago 96mg/g; current 98mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 148mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 154mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
